title: Specklinia trifida
taxonomy: Specklinia trifida is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid that belongs to the genus Specklinia. Specklinia trifida is further classified into the subfamily Pleurothallidinae and the tribe Epidendreae. The family Orchidaceae is one of the largest and most diverse plant families, consisting of over 30,000 known species. Specklinia trifida's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the orchid family.
